win_condition: Win immediately by reaching 20 VP or by being the last monster remaining alive.
tiebreaker: No formal point tiebreaker in standard rules; resolve by normal turn/effect order.

categories.label: Dice Set VP
categories.description: VP from rolling triples (1/2/3) and extra matching dice.

categories.label: Tokyo Start VP
categories.description: 2 VP when starting turn in Tokyo.

categories.label: Power Card VP
categories.description: Any VP granted by purchased power cards.

categories.label: Last Monster Standing
categories.description: Alternative win path by eliminating all opponents.
